components.name: accordion
components.title: Accordion
components.description: A disclosure list with spring height animation, rotating chevrons, and single or multiple open modes.

components.name: agent-timeline
components.title: Agent Timeline
components.description: A vertical timeline of agent steps with live status, a spring-filled connector, and collapsible reasoning or tool-output bodies that morph open.

components.name: animated-beam
components.title: Animated Beam
components.description: An animated gradient beam that travels along a path connecting two separate nodes.

components.name: animated-testimonials
components.title: Animated Testimonials
components.description: A testimonial carousel with a shuffling image stack, word-by-word quote reveal, and autoplay.

components.name: animated-tooltip
components.title: Animated Tooltip
components.description: A tooltip that springs in and tilts in 3D as the pointer moves across its trigger.

components.name: app-showcase
components.title: App Showcase
components.description: A realistic iPhone or Android device frame that shows your app on screen, with scroll, loop, carousel, and cluster interactions.

components.name: aurora-text
components.title: Aurora Text
components.description: Gradient text with a rainbow aurora that drifts across the letters.

components.name: avatar-group
components.title: Avatar Group
components.description: Overlapping avatars that fan apart on hover, with a +N overflow chip.

components.name: beam-draw
components.title: Beam Draw
components.description: SVG beams that draw themselves along scroll progress with a soft glow.

components.name: bento-grid
components.title: Bento Grid
components.description: A modular bento layout of mixed-size cards that stagger in on scroll and lift with a spotlight on hover.

components.name: blueprint-grid
components.title: Blueprint Grid
components.description: A technical blueprint lattice — ruled lines, a dot matrix, or a perspective floor — with a diagonal light sweep and a cursor spotlight. Pure CSS.

components.name: border-beam
components.title: Border Beam
components.description: An animated beam of light that travels around the border of its container.

components.name: breadcrumbs
components.title: Breadcrumbs
components.description: A breadcrumb trail with hover-fill pills, animated path changes, and an overflow that collapses into an expandable popover.

components.name: card-swap
components.title: Card Swap
components.description: A 3D stack of cards that cycles through a showcase loop, with pointer parallax and spring re-flow.

components.name: combobox
components.title: Combobox
components.description: A type-ahead autocomplete with staggered result reveal, highlighted matches, keyboard navigation, and an async loading state.

components.name: command-palette
components.title: Command Palette
components.description: A ⌘K command menu with fuzzy filtering, keyboard navigation, and a spring-tracked active highlight.

components.name: comment-pin
components.title: Comment Pin
components.description: Figma-style annotation pins that spring in over any surface and expand into a threaded comment popover with a reply field.

components.name: confetti
components.title: Confetti
components.description: A physics-based confetti burst with an imperative fire API for celebratory moments.

components.name: container-scroll
components.title: Container Scroll
components.description: A device frame that un-tilts from a 3D perspective and scales to rest as you scroll — the classic product hero.

components.name: context-menu
components.title: Context Menu
components.description: A right-click menu that springs from the cursor point and flips to stay in the viewport, with shortcuts and destructive actions.

components.name: conversation-thread
components.title: Conversation Thread
components.description: A streaming AI chat surface where messages spring in, tokens reveal with a blinking caret, hover actions fade in, and the view auto-sticks to the latest message.

components.name: cover-flow
components.title: Cover Flow
components.description: A physics 3D cover flow — the centered slide faces front while neighbours rotate away in perspective, with momentum drag and snap.

components.name: dock
components.title: Dock
components.description: A macOS-style dock whose items magnify with spring physics as the pointer moves across them.

components.name: drawer
components.title: Drawer
components.description: A draggable bottom or side sheet with rubber-band physics, flick-to-dismiss, scrim, and scroll lock.

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.title: Dropdown Menu
components.description: An accessible dropdown that springs open from its trigger edge, with submenus, shortcuts, separators, and keyboard navigation.

components.name: dynamic-island
components.title: Dynamic Island
components.description: An Apple-inspired pill that springs between size presets while its content cross-fades.

components.name: elastic-text
components.title: Elastic Text
components.description: Variable-font text whose weight springs up under an automatic spotlight or the pointer.

components.name: filter-bar
components.title: Filter Bar
components.description: A faceted filter bar with searchable multi-select popovers, count badges, and active filters that spring in and out as chips.

components.name: floating-toolbar
components.title: Floating Toolbar
components.description: A context toolbar that springs into view with magnetic, morphing action buttons.

components.name: flow-field
components.title: Flow Field
components.description: Particles streaming along an evolving noise vector field, leaving silky fading trails. Paints its own themed background.

components.name: fluid-cursor
components.title: Fluid Cursor
components.description: A spring-lagged blend-mode cursor that trails the pointer and swells over interactive elements.

components.name: globe
components.title: Globe
components.description: A draggable, auto-rotating WebGL globe with glowing location markers.

components.name: gooey-fab
components.title: Gooey FAB
components.description: A floating action button that gooey-morphs to extrude its satellite actions like liquid metaballs.

components.name: gravity
components.title: Gravity
components.description: A physics playground where elements fall, pile, collide, and can be dragged and flung.

components.name: hero-parallax
components.title: Hero Parallax
components.description: A scroll-driven grid of cards that drift in alternating directions on a tilted perspective plane.

components.name: highlighter
components.title: Highlighter
components.description: Hand-drawn rough-notation annotations (highlight, underline, box, circle) over text.

components.name: hold-confirm-button
components.title: Hold Confirm Button
components.description: Press and hold to confirm a destructive action; a radial fill commits at 100% and releasing early cancels.

components.name: holographic-card
components.title: Holographic Card
components.description: A trading-card holo effect — iridescent foil, specular glare, and glitter that tilt and shift with the pointer or device gyroscope.

components.name: image-accordion
components.title: Image Accordion
components.description: Horizontal image panels that expand on hover to reveal their caption — an elegant, space-efficient gallery.

components.name: image-compare
components.title: Image Compare
components.description: A draggable before/after slider with clip-path reveal, keyboard support, and a pulsing handle hint.

components.name: image-trail
components.title: Image Trail
components.description: Images spawn along the pointer's path, pop in, and drift away — the signature portfolio hover effect.

components.name: inertia-gallery
components.title: Inertia Gallery
components.description: A horizontal gallery you throw with the pointer — momentum carries it, it rubber-bands at the ends, and slides scale, blur, and fade with distance from center.

components.name: lamp
components.title: Lamp
components.description: A conic-gradient lamp that ignites and reveals a headline as it scrolls into view.

components.name: light-rays
components.title: Light Rays
components.description: Volumetric god-rays that slowly sweep and breathe, with optional film grain. Pure CSS.

components.name: liquid-glass-card
components.title: Liquid Glass Card
components.description: A glass panel that refracts the content behind it with a mouse-tracked specular highlight.

components.name: liquid-glass-lens
components.title: Liquid Glass Lens
components.description: A circular glass lens that floats over your content and follows the cursor, refracting everything beneath it.

components.name: liquid-image
components.title: Liquid Image
components.description: A premium hover effect that ripples and distorts an image like liquid, intensifying with cursor speed.

components.name: liquid-metaballs
components.title: Liquid Metaballs
components.description: Gooey blobs that drift, collide, and merge under an SVG goo filter, with an optional cursor blob. Per-instance filter id.

components.name: live-cursors
components.title: Live Cursors
components.description: Smoothly interpolated multiplayer cursors with trailing name flags and optional cursor-chat, plus a self-driving simulated-peer mode.

components.name: magic-button
components.title: Magic Button
components.description: A tactile 3D push button with an animated rainbow edge and shadow.

components.name: magic-input
components.title: Magic Input
components.description: A 3D layered text input that lifts on focus with an optional rainbow edge animation.

components.name: magic-tab
components.title: Magic Tab
components.description: A segmented tab bar where the selected option lifts into a 3D button with an optional rainbow edge.

components.name: magnetic-button
components.title: Magnetic Button
components.description: A button whose content is magnetically pulled toward the cursor within a sensor range, springing back on exit.

components.name: marquee
components.title: Marquee
components.description: An infinite, seamless scrolling row or column of content that pauses on hover.

components.name: mask-button
components.title: Mask Button
components.description: A button whose face wipes away on hover via an animated CSS sprite-sheet mask, revealing the label behind it.

components.name: mega-menu
components.title: Mega Menu
components.description: A Vercel-style navigation menu with a direction-aware highlight and a panel that springs and height-morphs between triggers.

components.name: morph-gallery
components.title: Morph Gallery
components.description: A thumbnail grid where a tile morphs into a fullscreen detail view via a shared-element transition, with swipe and keyboard navigation.

components.name: morphing-dialog
components.title: Morphing Dialog
components.description: A card that physically morphs into a modal through a shared layout, then springs back on close.

components.name: notification-inbox
components.title: Notification Inbox
components.description: A Linear-style notification center with time-bucketed groups, unread accent rails, swipe-to-archive, mark-all-read, and a polished empty state.

components.name: number-ticker
components.title: Number Ticker
components.description: Animates a number to its target value with spring physics when scrolled into view.

components.name: orbit-carousel
components.title: Orbit Carousel
components.description: Slides ride an arc and rotate around a pivot, tilting and receding with angular distance from the front, with momentum drag and snap.

components.name: orbiting-circles
components.title: Orbiting Circles
components.description: Icons that orbit a center point on a configurable ring, staying upright as they travel.

components.name: otp-input
components.title: OTP Input
components.description: A segmented one-time-code input with auto-advance, paste-to-fill, a traveling caret, and error shake.

components.name: particle-dissolve
components.title: Particle Dissolve
components.description: Text or an image is sampled into particles that scatter and reform — a dramatic entrance or transition.

components.name: pixel-grid
components.title: Pixel Grid
components.description: A grid of flickering squares with an optional cursor spotlight that lights up nearby pixels.

components.name: presence-facepile
components.title: Presence Facepile
components.description: Live avatars with animated status rings, spring join/leave, and a +N overflow that expands into a presence list.

components.name: progress-fold-button
components.title: Progress Fold Button
components.description: A button whose front face folds back to reveal a controlled progress bar while loading.

components.name: progressive-card-reveal
components.title: Progressive Card Reveal
components.description: A vertical stack of cards where one card expands to its full view while the rest collapse to compact pills, animating the morph between them.

components.name: prompt-composer
components.title: Prompt Composer
components.description: An AI input box with an auto-growing textarea, attachment chips, an inline model picker, and a send button that morphs into a stop control while streaming.

components.name: prompt-suggestions
components.title: Prompt Suggestions
components.description: Animated starter prompts for AI empty states that stagger in, lift on hover, and feed straight into the composer when chosen.

components.name: reorder-list
components.title: Reorder List
components.description: A drag-to-reorder list where items lift on grab, spring to place, and neighbours flow around them.

components.name: resizable-header
components.title: Resizable Header
components.description: A sticky navbar that springs into a compact, blurred floating pill as you scroll, with a shared-element active indicator.

components.name: scroll-progress
components.title: Scroll Progress
components.description: A spring-smoothed reading indicator — a pinned top bar or a fading back-to-top ring.

components.name: scroll-reveal
components.title: Scroll Reveal
components.description: Reveals its children with a spring as they scroll into view, with optional scroll-velocity skew.

components.name: scroll-stack
components.title: Scroll Stack
components.description: Pinned cards that scale, recede, and stack as the page scrolls — the premium feature-reveal section.

components.name: scroll-text-reveal
components.title: Scroll Text Reveal
components.description: Kinetic typography that scrubs each word from dim to sharp as the paragraph scrolls through view — reverses cleanly on scroll-up.

components.name: scroll-timeline
components.title: Scroll Timeline
components.description: A scrollytelling timeline whose progress line grows as you scroll, revealing entries with sticky labels.

components.name: segmented-control
components.title: Segmented Control
components.description: An iOS-style selector with a sliding pill that springs between options.

components.name: shimmer-button
components.title: Shimmer Button
components.description: A button with an animated shimmering border light that speeds up on hover.

components.name: slide-confirm-button
components.title: Slide Confirm Button
components.description: A drag-to-confirm thumb for high-stakes actions that snaps past a threshold and springs back otherwise.

components.name: source-citations
components.title: Source Citations
components.description: Inline numbered citation pills that spring out a rich preview card on hover, plus a collapsible source list for AI answers.

components.name: spotlight-card
components.title: Spotlight Card
components.description: A card with a radial spotlight glow that follows the pointer, optionally lighting the border.

components.name: spotlight-reveal
components.title: Spotlight Reveal
components.description: A cursor-following flashlight that cuts through the top layer to expose a hidden layer beneath.

components.name: stack-badge
components.title: Stack Badge
components.description: A tech-stack wall of monochrome logo chips that stagger in on scroll and lift into their full brand color with a soft glow on hover; ships 20 built-in tech logos plus custom items.

components.name: stepper
components.title: Stepper
components.description: A step indicator with a spring-filled progress line and a number-to-checkmark morph.

components.name: sticky-scroll
components.title: Sticky Scroll
components.description: A pinned two-column reveal where scrolling the text steps a synced visual panel through each item.

components.name: store-badge
components.title: Store Badge
components.description: App Store and Google Play download badges with light/dark finishes, a hover sheen, and an optional scan-to-download QR popover.

components.name: swipe-deck
components.title: Swipe Deck
components.description: A physics, Tinder-style swipeable card deck with throw-to-dismiss, directional intent, and keyboard controls.

components.name: tab-bar
components.title: Tab Bar
components.description: A mobile bottom navigation where a shared-element blob slides under the active tab and the icon gives a haptic-style pop.

components.name: text-animate
components.title: Text Animate
components.description: Staggered text entrance animations (fade, blur, slide) by character, word, or line.

components.name: text-scramble
components.title: Text Scramble
components.description: Characters cycle through random glyphs and resolve into the target text — a decrypt / matrix reveal.

components.name: three-d-marquee
components.title: 3D Marquee
components.description: A perspective grid of images whose columns drift in alternating directions on a tilted plane.

components.name: tilt-card
components.title: Tilt Card
components.description: A card that tilts in 3D toward the pointer with parallax depth and a specular glare.

components.name: toast
components.title: Toast
components.description: Stacked, swipe-dismissible toasts with an imperative toast() API and auto-dismiss.

components.name: topographic-drift
components.title: Topographic Drift
components.description: Slowly drifting topographic contour lines — a living elevation map drawn with marching squares on a Canvas.

components.name: voice-orb
components.title: Voice Orb
components.description: A Siri-style audio-reactive orb that breathes when idle, pulses while listening, and swells with the voice as it speaks.

components.name: warp-starfield
components.title: Warp Starfield
components.description: A depth starfield you fly through — stars stream toward the viewer with cursor parallax and an optional hyperspace warp.

components.name: world-map
components.title: World Map
components.description: A dotted world map that draws animated arcs between locations, with pulsing endpoint pins.
